title: Batch embedding with cache-aware pipeline
description:
**As a** ReportBlock, **I want** to compute embeddings for a list of texts using cache for hits and the model for misses, **so that** re-indexing does not mean re-embedding.

The `EmbeddingService` class checks cache for each text, computes only misses via sentence-transformers, and writes new embeddings back through the cache. The existing `plexus/analysis/topics/analyzer.py` uses BERTopic's built-in sentence-transformers; this story extracts embedding into a standalone cacheable step that the new ReportBlock will call directly.

The key interface is `batch_embed(texts: List[str], model_id: str, version: str) -> List[np.ndarray]`. It must preserve the original ordering of texts in the returned embeddings list, even when cache hits and misses are interleaved.

## Key Files

- Modify: `plexus/analysis/embedding_cache.py` (add `EmbeddingService` class)
- Modify: `plexus/analysis/embedding_cache_test.py`

## Dependencies

Story plx-8221a1 (S3 read/write for cached embeddings)

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Feature: Batch embedding with cache-aware pipeline

  Scenario: All cache hits, no model invocation
    Given 10 texts that all have cached embeddings
    When batch_embed(texts, model_id, version) is called
    Then 10 embedding vectors are returned
    And the sentence-transformer model is never called
    And 10 cache get calls are made and 0 cache put calls

  Scenario: All cache misses, all computed and cached
    Given 10 texts with no cached embeddings
    And a mocked sentence-transformer model that returns 384-dim vectors
    When batch_embed(texts, model_id, version) is called
    Then 10 embedding vectors are returned
    And the model encode method is called once with all 10 texts
    And 10 cache put calls are made

  Scenario: Mixed hits and misses preserves order
    Given 10 texts where 6 are cached and 4 are not
    When batch_embed(texts, model_id, version) is called
    Then 10 embedding vectors are returned in the original order
    And the model is called with only the 4 uncached texts
    And 4 cache put calls are made

  Scenario: Empty text list returns empty
    Given an empty list of texts
    When batch_embed([], model_id, version) is called
    Then an empty list of vectors is returned
    And no cache or model calls are made
